Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x6000 "BCSQUESTFORTIRES-033C-6000" -Di_table_addr=0x02 -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $033c dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "BC's Quest For Tires.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $033C to copy a memory block down to $01DE to $0248 that was placed there by the original loader. It also sets the stack pointer to $DF to allow for the first part of this memory block residing on the stack. The actual entry point is $0447, although this causes a jump to $551D which displays the manual protection step. Therefore the init routine jumps to $6000 to skip this.
The loading screen is from the disk version
